text.content: Yannick requested help creating and testing OpenAI API demo scripts, which evolved into building a comprehensive web platform. The session covered creating advanced Python demos, implementing iOS solutions, converting the project to a permanent website with International Typographic Style design, fixing routing and API errors, and finally adding visual progress indicators to improve user experience during script execution.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Yannick requested help creating and testing OpenAI API demo scripts, which evolved into building a comprehensive web platform. The session covered creating advanced Python demos, implementing iOS solutions, converting the project to a permanent website with International Typographic Style design, fixing routing and API errors, and finally adding visual progress indicators to improve user experience during script execution.


## Context & Intent

User wanted to test OpenAI API capabilities and create demo scripts, then progressively requested more complex implementations including iOS compatibility and a permanent web platform


## What Was Done

Created Python demo scripts, iOS implementation guides, built Flask web server, developed full-stack web application with React frontend and Express backend using International Typographic Style design, implemented comprehensive testing, fixed routing errors and API issues, added visual progress indicators


## Outputs Produced

- [script] openai_api_demo.py — Basic OpenAI API demonstration script
- [script] openai_advanced_demo.py — Advanced multi-feature OpenAI API demo
- [script] openai_capability_tests.py — Specialized capability testing script
- [guide] iOS Implementation Guides — Complete guides for native iOS and web-based approaches
- [web_app] OpenAI Demo Platform — Full-stack web application with International Typographic Style design
- [component] Progress Indicator — Visual progress bar with estimated completion time

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Chose web-based over native iOS for broader compatibility
- Implemented International Typographic Style design system
- Used Flask for backend with tRPC for API layer
- Added progress indicators to improve perceived performance

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Web-based approach provided cross-platform compatibility
- International Typographic Style created distinctive, professional appearance
- Progress indicators significantly improved user experience
- Comprehensive testing prevented major deployment issues
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial routing configuration caused 404 errors
- Python 3.13 compatibility issues required downgrade to 3.11
- API error handling needed improvement for better user feedback
Discoveries:

- HTML error pages returned as JSON caused parsing errors
- Visual feedback during long operations is crucial for user retention
- Clean environment setup prevents module conflicts

## Challenges & Blockers

- Python version compatibility issues
- API endpoint routing errors
- JSON parsing errors from HTML responses
- Long script execution times without user feedback

## Open Questions

- Should implement user API key input for live demos?
- Need syntax highlighting for better code readability?
- Would code playground with live editing add value?

## Next Steps

- Add syntax highlighting with Prism.js
- Implement code copy-to-clipboard buttons
- Create interactive code playground for user experimentation
